name: ultimate-vcf
description: Ultimate VCF — a rebuilt Vibe Coder Framework. An 8-phase loop (scope-lock → ground → shape → plan-check → build → confirm → verify → compound) whose plan→build→confirm spine kills the build↔audit moral hazard: the verifier gates acceptance (build proves before handoff), the confirm loop is bounded at 2 strikes, and a learning spine (decision-ledger + slice self-eval + framework-retro + incident→regression-test) makes the framework itself compound. Keeps the 6-tier system, Boil-the-Ocean, and Karpathy rules. v0.2.0 adds a physical enforcement layer (handoff.sh writes a diff-bound .proof; confirm audits the proof) — the LLM-council's unanimous hardening so the verifier gate can't be satisfied by prompt compliance alone.
